# Paprikabulk.com — Technical Documentation Center
> B2B paprika supplier knowledge base | B2B technical documentation for paprika procurement, quality control, specification interpretation, and global supply chain management
> Operated by Dinweys (Qingdao).Co.,Ltd
> Last Updated: August 2026

## Organization
- **Name:** Dinweys (Qingdao).Co.,Ltd
- **Brand:** Paprikabulk.com
- **Website:** https://paprikabulk.com
- **Documentation:** https://paprikabulk.com/
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/dinweys/paprika-docs

## Description
Complete B2B technical documentation library for paprika (Capsicum annuum) procurement, quality control, specification interpretation, and global supply chain management. Covers ASTA color value measurement, grade classification (Premium/Superior/Standard/Special), carotenoid chemistry, drying/grinding/sterilization processing, origin sourcing (Xinjiang, Hungary, Spain, Serbia, India), regulatory compliance (EU, FDA, FSMA, Codex, ESA), and quality system documentation (HACCP, ISO, CAPA, supplier qualification).

## Documentation Structure

### Core Navigation
- Home / Index: https://paprikabulk.com/
- About: https://paprikabulk.com/about/
- Abbreviations: https://paprikabulk.com/abbreviations/

## Key Facts

### ASTA Color Value
- Primary quality parameter for paprika trade
- Measured by spectrophotometry at 460nm (ASTA 20.1 / ISO 7541)
- Range: Standard 80-120, Superior 120-160, Premium 160-200, Special 200+
- Pricing directly correlates: ~5-15% premium per 10 ASTA points
- Degrades ~5-10%/year at 20°C in barrier packaging

### Grade Classification
- **Premium** (ASTA 160-200): Highest color, sweet flavor, ≤500 SHU
- **Superior** (ASTA 120-160): Best price-to-performance, ≤1,000 SHU
- **Standard** (ASTA 80-120): Economical, ≤2,000 SHU
- **Special** (ASTA 200+): Maximum color yield, ≤500 SHU

### Key Quality Parameters
- Moisture: ≤10% for powders, ≤12% for whole pods
- Capsanthin: ≥120 mg/100g (Premium), ≥55 (Standard)
- Total Ash: ≤8-10%, Acid-Insoluble Ash: ≤0.5-1.0%
- Salmonella: Negative/25g, E. coli: <10 CFU/g
- Aflatoxins: EU 10µg/kg total, US 20µg/kg action level

### Regulatory Compliance
- EU: EC 396/2005 (pesticides), EC 1881/2006 (contaminants)
- US: FSMA, FDA 21 CFR, FSVPC
- China: GB 2762-2022, GB 2763
- Japan: Positive List System
- Codex: CXS 193-1995

### Key Originating Regions
- Xinjiang, China: Highest ASTA (140-220)
- Hungary: Superior aroma, moderate ASTA (100-140)
- Spain (La Vera): Smoked PDO, ASTA 100-150
- California: Organic potential, low ASTA (80-120)
- India: Lowest cost, lower ASTA (60-100)

### Processing Methods
- Drying: Sun (7-15 days, -30-50% ASTA), Mechanical (6-12h, -10-20%)
- Grinding: Cryogenic (+1-3% retention), Pin mill (-8-15%)
- Sterilization: Steam (140°C, 30s), Irradiation (5-10 kGy), Ethylene Oxide (EU restricted)
- Packaging: Multi-layer barrier bags, N₂ flushing recommended

## Keywords
